resolution_summary: EXP-539-baby-batch-1.json Patch 2: extend the 'no rainbow smearing' parenthetical in §7.11 to add: dispersion requires wavelength-dependent n; the dome has not committed to this; dispersion is therefore a conditional prediction; angular-shift and TIR signatures are stronger because they do not require wavelength-dependence. Logically completes the dispersion falsification claim without weakening the overall test.
action_for_decider: apply Patch 2 of EXP-539-baby-batch-1.json to data/sections.json; close ISS-2400
